title: STRAWBERRY PACK
description: A unique resource pack for a new berry
body:
![Strawberry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe33f26f68ffa05dcbf760b43fdd39be5c0ae3de.png)🌿 **A unique resource pack that transforms wild berries into juicy strawberries! **🍓 

This resource pack turns Minecraft's standard wild berries into vibrant and delicious strawberries, adding a touch of summer and coziness to the game. Now your farms, bushes, and dishes will look much more attractive, and harvesting will be a visual treat. Perfect for vanilla builds, farms, and cozy villages!

✨** Transform your world by collecting real strawberries in Minecraft!**
